strings.app.name: LinguaLoop
strings.panel.progressHint: We show you what you're learning and why, transparently. No rush — take your time.
strings.done.title: You've finished everything due right now.
strings.done.sub: We'll bring items back when it's time to review. No need to rush.
strings.mastery.empty: No records yet. Try your first item.
strings.ach.empty: No certifications yet. Let's build them one by one.
strings.profile.title: Profile
strings.badge.title: Badges
strings.badge.none: No badges yet. Earn them as you learn and contribute.
strings.place.title: Level check (placement)
strings.place.intro: A few questions adaptively estimate your current level — get them right and harder items appear, struggle and easier ones do. Answers are graded only on the server, and the result sets a starting point (i+1) that fits you. No rush.
strings.read.hint: Tap a word you don't know to see its meaning. You don't need to know every word — a rough understanding is enough (comprehensible input, i+1).
strings.read.none: No reading passages for this language yet.
strings.tutor.hint: Write and I'll naturally correct you and keep the conversation going. Mistakes are fine — correction is learning.
strings.scenario.title: Choose a scene
strings.pron.note: Listen to the native pronunciation and compare yourself. The goal is intelligible speech rather than a perfect accent (intelligibility first). Your voice is processed only in the browser and never sent to the server.
strings.pron.none: No pronunciation data for this language yet.
strings.contrib.title: Contribute content
strings.contrib.intro: Anyone can contribute learning content. Once it passes the automatic quality gate + peer review, it's shown to everyone — unverified content is never shown.
strings.contrib.promptPh: Question or meaning (e.g. what does apple mean?)
strings.contrib.reviewHint: Please review others' contributions. Approve if accurate, reject if not. Reviews are weighted by track-record trust — accurate reviewing grows your vote's weight, while manipulative votes weaken.
strings.contrib.leaderboardHint: Shown contributions are re-ranked by real learning effect (accuracy · discrimination), not popularity. As data accumulates, items that teach well rise and broken ones are demoted.
strings.contrib.needBoth: Enter both a question and an answer.
strings.contrib.submitted: Submitted — it's in the review queue. It'll be shown once it passes peer review.
strings.contrib.noReview: No one else's contributions to review.
strings.learner.label: Learner
strings.pron.noASR: Speech recognition unavailable — continue with self-rating
strings.confirm.reset: Permanently delete your learning records? This can't be undone.
strings.footer.text: Outcomes are the goal — no streaks, no pressure. Review timing is set by memory science (FSRS).

note: UI locale pack (display language = English). Rule 9 — no loss-aversion/coercion copy, outcome-focused only. Independent of the learning language. {n}·{pct} etc. are substituted by the app.
